metadata.name: Basic Trio Playtests
metadata.description: Scripted local API smoke runs for the three-class early-basic dogfood project.

scripts.label: Mage Lance Smoke
scripts.description: Create a Basic Trio Mage match, cast Ember Lance from Player 1 into Player 2, then verify health.

steps.label: P1 casts Ember Lance at P2

scripts.label: Mage Spell Power Smoke
scripts.description: Create a Basic Trio Mage match, play Spark Adept, cast Ember Lance, then verify spell damage.

steps.label: P1 casts empowered Ember Lance at P2

scripts.label: Warrior Axe Smoke
scripts.description: Create a Basic Trio Warrior match, attack with the equipped Forge Axe, then verify health.

steps.label: P1 strikes P2 with Forge Axe

scripts.label: Warrior Reaper Smoke
scripts.description: Break the starting weapon, equip Heavy Reaper from hand, attack, then verify hero health and weapon zone state.

steps.label: P1 strikes P2 with Forge Axe
P1 strikes P2 with Heavy Reaper
Assert P1 has one equipped weapon

scripts.label: Warrior Focus Smoke
scripts.description: Give the Warrior hero temporary attack, spend it on the enemy hero, then verify damage.

steps.label: Assert P1 hero attack is spent

scripts.label: Warrior Focus Axe Smoke
scripts.description: Give the Warrior hero temporary attack, stack it with Forge Axe, then verify combined weapon damage and cleanup.

steps.label: P1 attacks with focused Forge Axe
Assert P1 hero attack is spent

scripts.label: Warrior Rush Expiry Smoke
scripts.description: Exhaust a friendly minion, use Battle Rush to ready and buff it, attack again, then expire the temporary attack.

steps.label: P1 casts Battle Rush on River Guard
P1 attacks again with rushed River Guard
Assert River Guard attack returned to 2

scripts.label: Neutral Battlecry Smoke
scripts.description: Play a neutral Battlecry minion with an object target, then verify the selected enemy minion takes damage.

steps.label: P1 plays Needle Scout at an enemy minion

scripts.label: Warrior Storm Runner Smoke
scripts.description: Play a ready Warrior minion, attack immediately, then verify hero health.

scripts.label: Warrior Drummer Smoke
scripts.description: Play a summon-trigger minion, play a small recruit, attack immediately, then verify hero health.

steps.label: P1 attacks with the readied recruit

scripts.label: Warrior Banner Aura Smoke
scripts.description: Play a continuous attack-aura minion, attack with an existing friendly minion, then verify buffed damage.

steps.label: P1 attacks with aura-buffed River Guard

scripts.label: Warrior Area Smoke
scripts.description: Create a Basic Trio Warrior match, cast Ring Sweep, then verify both boards take minion damage.

scripts.label: Warrior Random Smoke
scripts.description: Create a Basic Trio Warrior match, cast Split Strike, then verify deterministic random minion damage through the live API.

steps.label: Assert P1 minion health is unchanged

scripts.label: Warrior Edict Smoke
scripts.description: Damage an enemy minion, then destroy it with Battle Edict through the live API.

scripts.label: Priest Mind Smoke
scripts.description: Create a Basic Trio Priest match, cast Mind Spark from Player 1 into Player 2, then verify health.

steps.label: P1 casts Mind Spark at P2

scripts.label: Priest Glimpse Smoke
scripts.description: Copy a random card from the enemy hand through the live API without moving the source card.

steps.label: P1 casts Mind Glimpse at P2

scripts.label: Priest Bloom Smoke
scripts.description: In a live API match without phase auto-run, play Dawn Cleric, heal a damaged minion with Holy Bloom, and verify the heal trigger fires.

steps.label: P2 damages P1 minions with Ember Wave

scripts.label: Priest Control Smoke
scripts.description: Create a Basic Trio Priest match, cast Borrowed Command, then verify the enemy minion moves to the caster board.

steps.label: Assert P1 board has two objects

scripts.label: Priest Verdict Smoke
scripts.description: Create a Basic Trio Priest match, cast Final Verdict, then verify the high-attack enemy minion is destroyed.

scripts.label: Mage Board Tools Smoke
scripts.description: Create a Basic Trio Mage match, summon two guard tokens, damage and freeze an enemy minion, then verify zone and object state.

steps.label: P1 casts Frost Pin at P2 minion
Assert P1 board has three objects

scripts.label: Mage Hero Freeze Smoke
scripts.description: Create a Basic Trio Mage match, cast Frost Pin at the enemy hero, then verify hero damage and the frozen hero flag.

steps.label: P1 casts Frost Pin at P2 hero

scripts.label: Mage Area Smoke
scripts.description: Create a Basic Trio Mage match, cast Ember Wave, then verify it damages the enemy board minion.

steps.label: Assert P2 board still has one object
Assert P2 large minion health is 6

scripts.label: Mage Stasis Column Smoke
scripts.description: Create a Basic Trio Mage match, freeze the enemy board, then cast the heavier area spell.

steps.label: Assert P2 large minion health is 3

scripts.label: Mage Glacier Smoke
scripts.description: Play Glacier Warden, ready it through the refresh module, attack an enemy minion, then verify damage.

steps.label: P1 attacks enemy minion with Glacier Warden
Assert P2 large minion health is 4

scripts.label: Mage Glacier Hero Freeze Smoke
scripts.description: Play Glacier Warden, ready it, attack the enemy hero, then verify damage and the frozen hero flag.

steps.label: P1 attacks enemy hero with Glacier Warden

scripts.label: Mage Random Smoke
scripts.description: Create a Basic Trio Mage match, cast Cinder Sparks, then verify three deterministic random choices and damage events.

scripts.label: Mage Transform Smoke
scripts.description: Create a Basic Trio Mage match, cast Null Form, then verify the enemy minion becomes a 1/1 transformed body.

steps.label: Assert P2 board still has one object

scripts.label: Neutral Minion Play Smoke
scripts.description: Create a Basic Trio Mage match, play the drawn neutral minion from hand, then verify it becomes a public exhausted board object.

steps.label: P1 plays the drawn River Guard
Assert P1 board has two objects
